title: SILENT DISCO NORTHAMPTON: POP VS INDIE VS DANCE
description: Three channels. One buzzing dance floor. Northampton's Silent Disco Battle returns with a pop vs indie vs dance showdown. Grab your glowing headphones, pick your channel, and prepare to laugh as your mates belt a totally different chorus while you're busy on your own. Expect DJ battles, hilarious headphone-off moments, and those "OMG this song!" scrambles when everyone switches to the same track at once. Ten years of sold-out nights prove it — this isn't a gimmick, it's the ultimate no-compromise night out.
